fields.summary: Share NMTokens using NMTokenCache (api-based) instead of memory based approach which is used currently.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description: It is a follow up ticket for YARN-694. Changing the way NMTokens are shared.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body: Thanks [~bikassaha] for identifying this.

static NMTokenCache is created which will be one per jvm. RMContainerAllocator/AMRMClient will put newly received tokens in it. NMClient /ContainerManagementProtocolProxy which needs NMToken for creating authenticated connection with NM will pick up token from here.

Quick review on the patch:
 - Please add audience annotations for NMTokenCache class and the individual methods too just to be sure.
 - NMTokenCache.setNMToken(..) should be synchronized? Not sure, but please check.
 - Move NMTokenCache to api instead of api.impl.
Increasing timout

Correct me if I am wrong - while grepping for this JIRA in the different branches, looks like this never made it to branch-2.1* or branch-2.2*. 

Given this is an incompatible change, should we remove this from branch-2 as well?
Sorry for the false alarm. Looks like it did make it - commit message was misspelt.

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

comments.body: Thanks [~bikassaha] for identifying this.

static NMTokenCache is created which will be one per jvm. RMContainerAllocator/AMRMClient will put newly received tokens in it. NMClient /ContainerManagementProtocolProxy which needs NMToken for creating authenticated connection with NM will pick up token from here.
